name: Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, margarine, and evaporated milk in a heavy 2.5-quart saucepan. Bring to a full rolling boil, stirring constantly.
2. Continue boiling until the candy thermometer reaches 234°F, or for an additional 5 minutes over medium heat, stirring constantly to prevent scorching.
3. Remove from heat; stir in chocolate chips until melted.
4. Add marshmallow creme, nuts, and vanilla. Beat until well blended.
5. Pour into a greased 9x13-inch pan.
6. Cool at room temperature.
7. Cut into squares. Makes approximately 3 pounds.
